title: llm-rubric-eval-ts
pitch: Run rubric-based LLM evals with reproducible datasets and provider-agnostic adapters.
keyFeatures: Rubric schema with typed scoring + explanations
Dataset versioning with content hashes and snapshots
Provider-agnostic adapters powered by your llm-chain interface
Deterministic eval runs (seed, temperature, retries, timeouts)
Markdown/JSON reports suitable for GitHub PR comments
targetUsers: TypeScript teams evaluating prompts/models across OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini in CI.
